findings.description: PascalCase class names from the error stack trace in the source are absent from hints: `TokenMgrError` (the root-cause error class) and `HtmlChecker` / `HtmlSyntaxChecker` (nablarch test-tool classes). A user diagnosing the error by class name would not find this entry.
findings.source_evidence: nablarch.test.tool.htmlcheck.HtmlChecker, nablarch.test.tool.htmlcheck.HtmlSyntaxChecker, nablarch.test.tool.htmlcheck.parser.TokenMgrError all appear in the stack trace in the source question block.
